title: Brazil puts tokenized cows to work as loan collateral: Report
summary: Brazil puts tokenized cows to work as loan collateral: Report
briefing: Ten tokenized dairy cows backed a $19,600 loan registered on Brazil’s B3, in one of Brazil’s first uses of tokenized livestock as loan collateral.

title: Samsung Wallet plans stablecoin support in digital payments expansion
summary: Samsung Wallet plans stablecoin support in digital payments expansion
briefing: Samsung Electronics plans to add stablecoin support to Samsung Wallet, expanding its mobile payments and rewards platform to include digital assets.

title: Philippine bank BPI plans stablecoin payments pilot
summary: Philippine bank BPI plans stablecoin payments pilot
briefing: The Philippine bank is preparing a stablecoin settlement pilot intended to speed up and reduce the cost of overseas payments to Filipino remote workers.

title: BTC supply in profit eyes 60%, but analysis hints recovery may ‘roll back over’
summary: BTC supply in profit eyes 60%, but analysis hints recovery may ‘roll back over’
briefing: Bitcoin supply profitability improved versus its 2026 low, but analysis warned that a fake recovery had already broken down at the start of June.

title: South Korea’s Korbit to rebrand as Digital X under Mirae: Report
summary: South Korea’s Korbit to rebrand as Digital X under Mirae: Report
briefing: Mirae Asset reportedly plans to use the South Korean crypto exchange as a hub for tokenized assets, stablecoins and digital finance.

title: Ripple launches Mint to expand institutional access to RLUSD
summary: Ripple launches Mint to expand institutional access to RLUSD
briefing: Ripple launches Mint to expand RLUSD access for institutions as the stablecoin’s market cap approaches $1.6 billion.

title: Bitcoin mining pool Poolin files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy
summary: Bitcoin mining pool Poolin files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy
briefing: Bitcoin miner Poolin filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy and initiated a $52 million sale of its two West Texas mining sites as part of its future creditor recovery program.

title: EU widens Belarus ownership ban to all crypto service providers
summary: EU widens Belarus ownership ban to all crypto service providers
briefing: The EU will bar Belarusian nationals and residents from owning, controlling or managing exchanges and other MiCA-regulated crypto firms from Aug. 25.

title: Polymarket Account in Farage Backer's Name Took $9M in Crypto From Unknown Sources: FT
summary: Polymarket Account in Farage Backer's Name Took $9M in Crypto From Unknown Sources: FT
briefing: The "GCottrell93" account bet the funds on Trump's election win and cashed out the profit, though who paid in and who collected is unclear.

title: Black Forest Labs Unveils FLUX 3 AI: Ditches Stills for Video—And Robot Hands
summary: Black Forest Labs Unveils FLUX 3 AI: Ditches Stills for Video—And Robot Hands
briefing: FLUX 3 is the German AI lab’s first video model, and the same system is already teaching robots to work an Audi assembly line.

title: Goldman Sachs CEO Breaks With Wall Street to Back Crypto Clarity Act
summary: Goldman Sachs CEO Breaks With Wall Street to Back Crypto Clarity Act
briefing: Solomon's endorsement splits with JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon and banking trade groups, who warn the bill's stablecoin-yield provisions could pull deposits away from traditional lenders.

title: Nasdaq-Listed Zhibao Wants a Bitcoin Treasury, Plans to Sell $220M in Stock for BTC
summary: Nasdaq-Listed Zhibao Wants a Bitcoin Treasury, Plans to Sell $220M in Stock for BTC
briefing: A Shanghai-based insurance-tech company trading below $1 wants to build a bitcoin treasury by taking BTC directly as payment for new shares.

title: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev's X Account Hacked to Shill Fake 'Vladhood' Token
summary: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev's X Account Hacked to Shill Fake 'Vladhood' Token
briefing: The deleted post touted a bogus "Vladhood" token as the mascot of Robinhood Chain—the latest fraud to exploit a network currently dominated by memes.

title: Bitcoin May Have Already Bottomed—If the Fed Helps, Says Grayscale
summary: Bitcoin May Have Already Bottomed—If the Fed Helps, Says Grayscale
briefing: The crypto asset manager thinks the four-year cycle is dead, suggesting Bitcoin's price will follow macro forces and the Fed's next move.

title: Brazilian Farmers Are Tokenizing Cows to Get Farm Loans—And It's Working
summary: Brazilian Farmers Are Tokenizing Cows to Get Farm Loans—And It's Working
briefing: The first tokenized livestock deal on Brazil's stock exchange offers dairy farmers a lifeline as the sector's credit crisis deepens.

title: BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Pledge $15M to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin
summary: BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Pledge $15M to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin
briefing: Nine of the biggest institutional names in Bitcoin formed a consortium to fund the developers working to keep the network secure—including from future quantum computers.
